sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') AS year, SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS premium_production FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.EK_TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') IN ('2024', '2025') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') ORDER BY year FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Groups production by year using EK_TANZIM_TARIH_ID joined to GNL_TARIH, sums BRUT_PRIM_TL from FACT_POL_POLICE_EK.
risk_notes: Assumes EK_TANZIM_TARIH_ID is valid and populated for all relevant records.
description:
Question answered: What is the total premium production per year for the years 2024 and 2025 based on the 'EK_TANZIM_TARIH_ID' date field?
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Only records where the year is either 2024 or 2025 based on the 'EK_TANZIM_TARIH_ID' field.
Grouping/measures: Summing the 'BRUT_PRIM_TL' column grouped by year.
Expected output columns: year, premium_production
Assumptions: The 'EK_TANZIM_TARIH_ID' field represents the effective date of the policy for production reporting.

sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') AS year, SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS premium_production FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') IN ('2024', '2025') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') ORDER BY year FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Groups production by year using ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID joined to GNL_TARIH, sums BRUT_PRIM_TL from FACT_POL_POLICE_EK.
risk_notes: Uses ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID instead of EK_TANZIM_TARIH_ID, which may not align with production reporting conventions.
description:
Question answered: What is the total premium production per year for the years 2024 and 2025 based on the 'ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID' date field?
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Only records where the year is either 2024 or 2025 based on the 'ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID' field.
Grouping/measures: Summing the 'BRUT_PRIM_TL' column grouped by year.
Expected output columns: year, premium_production
Assumptions: The 'ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID' field represents the effective date of the main policy for production reporting.

sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') AS year, SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS premium_production FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') IN ('2024', '2025') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') ORDER BY year FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Groups production by year using BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID joined to GNL_TARIH, sums BRUT_PRIM_TL from FACT_POL_POLICE_EK.
risk_notes: Uses POLICE start date instead of EK_TANZIM_TARIH_ID, which may not reflect actual production timing.
description:

Filters: Only records where the year is either 2024 or 2025 based on the 'BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID' field.
Grouping/measures: Summing the 'BRUT_PRIM_TL' column grouped by year.
Expected output columns: year, premium_production
Assumptions: The 'BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID' field represents the start date of the policy for production reporting.
